chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-6544/2018 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For order on MA No.5518/2024 2. For order on MA No.5519/2024 3. For hearing of MA No.28613/2018 4. For hearing of main case. 06.03.2024 Khawaja Saiful Islam advocate............... 1. Urgency granted. 2. Seeks withdrawal of this petition as petitioner intends to avail remedy of civil suit. Dismissed as withdrawn. However interim order will remain intact for fifteen days only. J U D G E J U D G E IK
